overview.description: The Goldman Sachs Access Emerging Markets USD Bond ETF (GEMD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of USD-denominated emerging markets government bonds of various credit quality and maturity. Bonds are selected by multiple economic factors such as governance indicators, import coverage, and inflation. GEMD was launched on Feb 15, 2022 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
infoTable: FTSE Goldman Sachs Emerging Markets USD Bond Index
